DCDHK2026NoUntreated, DCDHVB2024NoStayers, KimKwonKwonLee2018, Wells1973, LeGruyer2009, DaniilidisHaddouLeGruyerLey2018: none gives the intercept-coupled support-gap ACR program

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The comparison to DCDHK2026NoUntreated is inaccurate: arXiv:2405.04465 says the no-QUG parallel-trends identification region for WAS is the entire real line and then adds homogeneous-effect routes, not a shape-only [0,B] fallback or parametric extrapolation branch.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless the redraft ties the clipped-arc bound to a named open problem or proves a sharper regime-opening claim beyond adding C^{1,1} shape restrictions to the no-QUG DID impossibility.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The finite falsification system lists only trace/intercept/gap clipped-area constraints; it must also include observed-support component constraints such as 0<=m'_P<=B and L-Lipschitz derivative on each observed interval, otherwise a violating observed component could pass all gap blocks.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the DCDHK comparison with the exact no-QUG result: parallel trends alone gives an unbounded WAS region, while this proposal adds explicit monotone/Lipschitz-slope restrictions for a different ACR(d0) target; then compare against the proposal's own shape-only [0,B] baseline.

Add the missing observed-support feasibility constraints to Conjecture 2 and to the proof sketch: componentwise derivative bounds, L-Lipschitz derivative checks, and endpoint-trace compatibility before gap pasting.

To reach flagship level, state a stronger regime-opening theorem: a sharp algorithmic identified set for no-QUG continuous DID under transparent C^{1,1} restrictions, with an explicit open-problem citation or a formal comparison showing strict improvement over the DCDHK no-QUG impossibility plus homogeneous-effect alternatives.

recommended_next_step: Revise the DCDHK comparison and the falsification certificate; then decide whether the kernel can be sharpened to a flagship regime-opening claim or should be routed as field-tier.
